mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBERSHIP_PT ( member_id, membership_id, gym_id, register_date, start_date, end_date, status, trainer_id, next_session, lesson_count, last_session ) VALUES ( #{memberNum}, #{membershipNum}, #{gymId}, CURDATE(), #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status}, #{trainerId}, #{nextSession}, #{lessonCount}, #{lastSession} )

INSERT INTO PAYMENT ( user_id, user_name, membership_id, mp_id, gym_id, order_id, trainer_id, payment_date, payment_price, payment_fee, method, status, payment_type ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{membershipNum}, #{mrNum}, #{gymId}, #{orderId}, #{trainerId}, NOW(), #{paymentPrice}, #{paymentFee}, #{method}, #{status}, #{paymentType} )
mapper.select: SELECT id AS mrNum, member_id AS memberNum, membership_id AS membershipNum, gym_id AS gymId, register_date AS registerDate, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, status, trainer_id AS trainerId, next_session AS nextSession, lesson_count AS lessonCount, last_session AS lastSession FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT WHERE id = #{value}

SELECT id AS paymentNum, user_id AS userId, user_name AS userName, membership_id AS membershipNum, mp_id AS mrNum, gym_id AS gymId, order_id AS orderId, trainer_id AS trainerId, payment_date AS paymentDate, payment_price AS paymentPrice, payment_fee AS paymentFee, method, status, payment_type AS paymentType, canceled_at AS canceledAt, reason FROM PAYMENT WHERE id = #{value}
SELECT id AS membershipNum, gym_id AS gymNum, trainer_id AS trainerNum, type, type_rep AS typeRep, price FROM MEMBERSHIP WHERE id = #{value}

SELECT p.id AS paymentNum, p.user_id AS userId, p.user_name AS userName, p.membership_id AS membershipNum, p.payment_price AS paymentPrice, p.method AS method, p.status AS status, p.reason AS reason, p.payment_date AS paymentDate, p.canceled_at AS canceledAt, u.name AS memberName, CONCAT( CASE WHEN m.type = 'pt' THEN 'PT ' WHEN m.type = 'day' THEN '1일 ' WHEN m.type = 'month' THEN '헬스장 ' ELSE '' END, m.type_rep, CASE WHEN m.type = 'pt' THEN '회권' WHEN m.type = 'month' THEN '개월 이용권' WHEN m.type = 'day' THEN '이용권' ELSE '' END ) AS membershipName FROM PAYMENT p JOIN `USER` u ON p.user_id = u.id JOIN MEMBERSHIP m ON p.membership_id = m.id WHERE p.gym_id = #{value} AND p.status = '환불요청' ORDER BY p.payment_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PAYMENT p WHERE p.gym_id = #{value} AND p.status = '환불요청'
mapper.update: UPDATE LESSON l JOIN PAYMENT p ON p.id = #{paymentNum} JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mp ON p.mp_id = mp.id SET l.status = '취소' WHERE l.trainer_id = mp.trainer_id AND l.client_id = mp.member_id AND l.status = '예약완료'
mapper.select: SELECT id AS paymentNum, user_id AS userId, user_name AS userName, membership_id AS membershipNum, mp_id AS mrNum, gym_id AS gymId, order_id AS orderId, trainer_id AS trainerId, payment_date AS paymentDate, payment_price AS paymentPrice, payment_fee AS paymentFee, method, status, payment_type AS paymentType, canceled_at AS canceledAt, reason FROM PAYMENT WHERE order_id = #{value}
mapper.update: UPDATE PAYMENT SET status = '취소완료', canceled_at = NOW(), reason = #{reason} WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = '결제완료'
UPDATE MEMBERSHIP_PT mp JOIN PAYMENT p ON p.mp_id = mp.id SET mp.status = 'expired' WHERE p.order_id = #{value}
